rationale.fidelity: Correctly rejects controllable availability, preserves the pre-realization assignment and post-observation limited recourse stages, and retains all cost components.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the planner, trigger, timing, trade-off, constraints, mechanism, and operational recourse pathway concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Bounds any stochastic-programming contribution as provisional but provides no literature relationship.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Treats scenario calibration and cost parameters as unsupported rather than established facts.
rationale.prose_clarity: Well structured but longer than needed and marred by encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A complete state-versus-choice and information-sequence repair with strong boundary discipline.
